task_description: Implement a multi-layer agent response restriction system (agent-guard) for the Si-Admin customer service AI agent. Includes input sanitization, scope enforcement, response limits, output validation, Prisma model for config storage, API route for CRUD, and admin dashboard UI.

verification.summary: npm run build exits 0 (all 30 pages compiled including new agent-guard route). npm run lint exits 0 (only 2 pre-existing warnings in unrelated files). No test framework configured in this project - verified via build and lint. No Docker in this project. Review fixes applied and verified: all 7 issues addressed.
